channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 10 ways AI can make your programming job easier—and more efficient
item.description: It is not surprising that programmers have been the primary beneficiaries of AI; after all, programming is precisely the sort of thing an AI can analyze. It’s a logical, structured science that relies on rules, conditions and structure.
item.dc:creator: Richard Baguley, Fast Company

item.title: AI audio wearables have an awkward problem
item.description: The biggest obstacle I’ve run into while reviewing the Plaud NotePin is figuring out what to do with it. This $169 wearable gadget, which is just a bit wider than a AA battery, attaches magnetically to your clothing and records the audio around you.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo’s Guts World Tour concert special lands on Netflix this month and it’s another reminder that I failed to score tickets to one of this year’s biggest tours
item.description: If you missed out on Olivia Rodrigo's GUTS World Tour, Netflix is releasing a concert special for you to rock out to on October 29.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: How not to waste 34 hours a month in meetings
item.description: None of the participants will ever forget this meeting, that much is certain. The venue was the US Department of Defense, starring a new Secretary of State responsible for procurement, who was to lead her first meeting with suppliers and colleagues from her own company.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Dropping RAM Prices: What's Behind the Shift?
item.description: RAM prices plummeting due to slower than expected PC growth, what does this mean for consumers and the industry?
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: El abecé de la IA generativa: estos son los términos clave que tiene que conocer
item.description: La IA generativa irrumpió en escena de forma abrupta y ha ocurrido igual con el nuevo lenguaje que trae consigo.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How Uber and Lyft are funding opposition efforts over San Francisco transit ballot
item.description: Uber and Lyft are funding opposition efforts over a ballot initiative in San Francisco that’s meant to increase funding for the city’s public transit system.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Spider lovers scurry to Colorado town in search of mating tarantulas and community
item.description: It’s tarantula mating season on the Colorado plains, when male spiders scurry out of their burrows in search of a mate.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Peipert And Hannah Schoenbaum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: L’economia digitale di fronte alla sfida della regolamentazione
item.description: Questo è forse uno dei dibattiti più frequenti quando si parla di legislazione in materia digitale: l’onere normativo ostacola l’innovazione? E, di conseguenza, fino a che punto è necessario regolamentare per creare un quadro solido, ma che faciliti le nuove proposte? L’eterno dilemma contrappone te
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Hurricane Helene brings climate change to forefront of the presidential campaign
item.description: The devastation wrought by Hurricane Helene has brought climate change to the forefront of the presidential campaign.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Daly, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: California spiked a landmark AI regulation. But that doesn’t mean the bill is going away
item.description: With the veto of California’s AI bill, the idea of regulating frontier models may be in jeopardy. The bill, SB 1047, would have required developers of the largest AI models (OpenAI, Anthropic, and the like) to set up and report on a safety framework, and submit to outside safety audits.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Accenture — Nvidia deal: A first peek into the new world of genAI-centric strategies
item.description: When Accenture on Wednesday rolled out a new partnership with Nvidia, including the creation of a 30,000-person Nvidia business unit, it could be seen as just another partnership expansion. And a couple of years ago, that would have been fair.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meta and Australia have partnered to crack down on ‘celeb bait’ scam ads
item.description: Meta said it has taken down some 8,000 so-called “celeb bait” scam ads from Facebook and Instagram as part of a new effort with Australian banks to curb the practice.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: OpenAI Raises $6.6 Billion in Venture Capital, Embarks on For-Profit Path
item.description: OpenAI, maker of ChatGPT, raises record-breaking venture capital investments as it shifts towards for-profit model
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tesla posts first quarterly increase in deliveries, but shares slump with investors hoping for more
item.description: Low interest financing, sweet lease deals, price cuts and free charging boosted Tesla’s global deliveries in the third quarter, the first increase this year for the electric vehicle maker.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 8 easy ways to transfer files between Windows and your phone
item.description: We live in a multi-device world. At a minimum, you almost certainly have both a computer and a phone — and potentially many more devices than that! And when it comes to transferring files between your Windows PC and whatever phone you’re using, you’re absolutely spoiled for choice.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Newsom throws AI regulation fight into uncertainty with veto
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom's (D) decision to veto a sweeping artificial intelligence (AI) bill has renewed the debate over the future of regulation of the technology, leaving different sectors of the tech industry largely in disagreement on the best path forward.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft releases official OpenAI library for .NET
item.description: Microsoft has released its official OpenAI library for .NET, with the goal of ensuring a smooth, reliable integration experience for developers working with OpenAI and Azure OpenAI services in .NET applications. Announced October 1, the now-stable library follows a beta release published in June.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Australia's online dating industry adopts code of conduct to keep users safer
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A code of conduct will be enforced on the online dating industry to better protect Australian users after research found that three-in-four people suffer some form of sexual violence through the platforms, Australia’s government said on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: California Governor Vetoed AI Safety Bill Amid Industry Objections
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom vetoed a hotly contested artificial intelligence safety bill after the tech industry raised objections.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: For Fiscal Service, intelligent automation transforms federal workflows
item.description: At the Bureau of the Fiscal Service, automation is helping to reduce manual workloads, and to increase employee efficiency and morale. The post For Fiscal Service, intelligent automation transforms federal workflows first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Dana Sukontarak, Federal News Network

item.title: Why determining the cost of cloud services cuts across an entire agency
item.description: Do you know your true cloud costs? The post Why determining the cost of cloud services cuts across an entire agency first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Epic Games is suing Google and Samsung for this phone setting
item.description: Video game maker Epic Games sued Google and Samsung on Monday, accusing the tech companies of coordinating to block third-party competition in application distribution on Samsung devices.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Appeals court reinstates Indiana lawsuit against TikTok alleging child safety, privacy concerns
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Indiana Court of Appeals has reinstated a lawsuit filed by the state accusing TikTok of deceiving its users about the video-sharing platform's level of inappropriate content for children and the security of its consumers’ personal information.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Jersey offshore wind farm clears big federal hurdle amid environmental concerns
item.description: SEA GIRT, N.J. (AP) — The federal government gave a key approval Tuesday to an offshore wind farm in New Jersey, even as residents in the town where its power cable would come ashore worry it could go through underground toxic waste that's still being cleaned up. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: WAYNE PARRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Judge partially dismisses FTC's antitrust lawsuit against Amazon
item.description: A federal judge on Monday partially dismissed the Federal Trade Commission’s (FTC) antitrust lawsuit against Amazon. However, few details are currently available about U.S. District Judge John Chun’s decision, which was filed under seal.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Scammers’ sneaky new tactic preying on people who’ve lost their iPhone
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how to protect yourself with eight steps if your iPhone is lost or stolen.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arkansas sues YouTube over claims that the site is fueling a mental health crisis
item.description: LITTLE ROCK, Ark. (AP) — Arkansas sued YouTube and parent company Alphabet on Monday, saying the video-sharing platform is made deliberately addictive and fueling a mental health crisis among youth in the state.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DeMILLO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Large language models hallucinating non-existent developer packages could fuel supply chain attacks
item.description: Large Language Models (LLMs) have a serious “package hallucination” problem that could lead to a wave of maliciously-coded packages in the supply chain, researchers have discovered in one of the largest and most in-depth ever studies to investigate the problem.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Federal Trade Commission employees vote to unionize
item.description: FTC began the process to unionize back in 2023, raising concerns about their access to telework, potential politicization of the civil service and other issues. The post Federal Trade Commission employees vote to unionize first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: Crypto owners evenly split between Harris, Trump: Poll
item.description: Americans who own cryptocurrency support Vice President Harris and former President Trump in equal numbers, according to new Morning Consult polling conducted on behalf of crypto exchange Coinbase.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: San Francisco rolls out AI-powered cameras to combat crime
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses San Francisco deploying three advanced mobile surveillance cameras to deter crime in high-risk areas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 6 ways to apply automation in devsecops
item.description: The goal of devsecops is to integrate security throughout the software development life cycle. To do this, the security team can’t focus on just the most obvious software development vulnerabilities or just the processes that are the easiest to secure.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Newsom vetoes bill for stricter AI regulations
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom (D) on Sunday vetoed a landmark artificial intelligence (AI) bill that would have created new safety rules for the emerging tech, handing much of Silicon Valley a major win.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Brazil judge makes new requests to allow X to be reinstated from suspension
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazilian Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes on Friday added conditions for Elon Musk’s X to have its service reestablished in the country, one day after the social media platform said it had complied with all the judge’s demands, including naming a legal representative.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Zero Trust + AI: A match made in the clouds
item.description: Have any terms in the cybersecurity space generated more buzz than “zero trust” and “AI”? At the risk of sounding like a Magic 8 Ball, my reply is no.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cloudflare accelerates its network with security, traffic optimizations
item.description: Cloudflare unwrapped a series of networking and security innovations during its birthday week event. The announcements include implementations of new and emerging internet standards that could have a wide-ranging impact over time.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Amazon's $4 billion partnership with AI startup Anthropic gets UK competition clearance
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Friday that it's clearing Amazon's partnership with artificial intelligence company Anthropic because the $4 billion deal didn't qualify for further scrutiny.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Small size, big clean: The world’s smallest dishwasher
item.description: Loch Electronics' latest innovation, the Capsule Solo, is a compact kitchen countertop dishwasher that can clean up to 35 dishes in just 15 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
